calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Petitioner Huan Shan Yu was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Tyler Tai-Le Liang.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
The minor's father, Yi Bin Yu, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined. At the request of the Court, Mr. Yu signed the petition for change of name of a minor at today's hearing.
Dong Qiang Yu was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for the minor's parents
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Annie Yu.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
